creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:

 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	dosage
-PORTVERSION=	1.8
+PORTVERSION=	1.9
 CATEGORIES=	deskutils python
 
 MAINTAINER=	antoine@FreeBSD.org

 USE_GITHUB=	yes
 GH_ACCOUNT=	wummel
 GH_TAGNAME=	upstream/${PORTVERSION}
-GH_COMMIT=	eb7f7d4
+GH_COMMIT=	5148087
 
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=yes
